subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and it became known that the righteous ones rejoiced at the freedom of this captive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و معلوم گردید که ابرار از آزادی این اسیر آنزلف
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @pain of love; love as veil
